title: OMNI Platform Suite
description: Internal dashboard for supply chain, order management, and content management
longDescription: All-in-one enterprise platform managing over 25 consumer goods/home furnishing brands across Philippines, Singapore, and Malaysia—including KitchenAid, Coleman, InstantPot, Oster, Tempur, Sealy, and more.
problem: Managing over 25 brands across 3 countries with disparate systems for inventory, orders, and content. Need for unified platform to handle complex cross-border e-commerce operations.
solution: Built all-in-one platform using NextJS, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS with component reusability across brands. Integrated supply chain, order management, CMS, and promo activation systems.
highlights: Enterprise platform managing over 25 consumer goods/home furnishing brands across Philippines, Singapore, and Malaysia
Processed over $400K in total revenue with over 2,000 customers and over 90 monthly transactions
Robust inventory and warehouse management system with more than 2 years of continuous operation

title: HRIS Employee Management System
description: Company-wide employee management system replacing legacy C#/jQuery system
longDescription: Modern employee management system serving 550+ employees with automated workflows for HR, accounting, and department managers.
problem: Legacy C#/jQuery system with poor UX, limited functionality, and high maintenance costs. HR and accounting teams struggling with inefficient workflows across 550+ employees.
solution: Complete system modernization using TypeScript, NextJS, and PostgreSQL. Designed production-ready architecture with intuitive UI/UX and automated workflows for multiple departments.
highlights: Modern stack upgrade from C# backend + jQuery to TypeScript + modern frontend
Improved user experience with intuitive, visually appealing interface
Process automation for HR, accounting, and department managers
End-to-end architecture designed for growing organization
Database design for complex employee data relationships

title: ChAI - Customer Success AI Integration
description: AI assistant that generates responses based on company documents, streamlining customer success team workflow
longDescription: AI-powered customer service tool using document-based response generation to handle routine inquiries and reduce team workload.
problem: Customer success team spending excessive time on routine inquiries. Need for automation to handle repetitive queries while maintaining quality and accuracy.
solution: AI-powered assistant using document-based response generation. Integrated with existing workflows and optimized for routine product inquiries, stock availability, and how-to questions.
highlights: Early AI adoption in customer service workflow
Measurable efficiency gains with 60% prompt acceptance rate
